content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_explorer
-- This is auto-generated code
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_csv/year=2024/month=01/vehicle_registration_2024-01.csv',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) AS [result]



-- Select data from sub-folders
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_csv/year=2024/**', --/*.csv read all the files in format .csv, ** read all sub-folders
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) AS [result]


-- Get data from more than one file
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK ('vehicle_registration_csv/year=2024/month=01/*', 
            'vehicle_registration_csv/year=2024/month=03/*'),--/*.csv read all the files in format .csv, ** read all sub-folders
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) AS [result]


-- Use more than one wildcard character.
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_csv/year=*/month=*/*',-- read all years, all months and all files
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) AS [result]


-- File metadata function filename()
SELECT
    result.filename() AS file_name,
    COUNT(1) AS record_count
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_csv/year=*/month=*/*',-- read all years, all months and all files
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) AS [result]
    GROUP BY result.filename()
    ORDER BY result.filename();


-- Limit data using filename()
SELECT
    result.filename() AS file_name,
    COUNT(1) AS record_count
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_csv/year=*/month=*/*',-- read all years, all months and all files
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) AS [result]
    WHERE result.filename() in ('vehicle_registration_2024-01.csv','vehicle_registration_2025-01.csv')
    GROUP BY result.filename()
    ORDER BY result.filename();

-- Use filepath() function
SELECT
    result.filepath(1) AS year,-- func parameters,1 : return the value to belongs to the first commodin value
    result.filepath(2) AS month, -- func parameters,2 : return the value to belongs to the second commomin value
    COUNT(1) AS record_count
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_csv/year=*/month=*/*',-- read all years, all months and all files
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) AS [result]
    WHERE result.filepath(1) = '2024'
            AND result.filepath(2) IN ('06','07','08') 
    GROUP BY result.filepath(1), result.filepath(2)
    ORDER BY result.filepath(1), result.filepath(2);
